title: Manufacturing Engineer - Oil India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Oil India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
